Package de.uka.ilkd.key.macros

Class PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.AbstractProofMacro
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.StrategyProofMacro
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofMacro
public class PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro extends StrategyProofMacro
The macro UseInformationFlowContractMacro applies all applicable information flow contracts.

The rules that are applied can be set in #ADMITTED_RULENAMES.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro.RemovePostStrategy
    This strategy accepts all rule apps for which the rule name starts with a string in the admitted set and rejects everything else.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
      Gets the name of this macro. Used as menu entry

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
      Gets the category of this macro. Used as name of the menu under which the macro is sorted. Return null if no submenu is to be created.
      Returns:
      a constant string, or null
